subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. He hath been One from all eternity and mighty over whatsoever He willeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو قد کان واحدا فی ازل الازال و مقتدرا علی ما اراد
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @absolute freedom; independence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for protection, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
